name.description: Full syllabus name in the primary language

board.description: Curriculum board or country (e.g., malaysia, cambridge)

level.description: Education level or framework (e.g., kssm, igcse)

code.description: Official subject code or identifier from the curriculum board

subjects.description: List of subject IDs belonging to this syllabus

assessment.description: Assessment structure for this syllabus including components and their weightings

components.description: List of assessment components (e.g., Paper 1, Paper 2, Coursework)

name.description: Name of the assessment component (e.g., Paper 1, Coursework)

weight.description: Weighting of this component as a decimal (0-1), all components should sum to 1

duration_minutes.description: Duration of this assessment component in minutes

grading.description: Grading system used for this syllabus

scale.description: Ordered list of grade labels from highest to lowest (e.g., [A*, A, B, C, D, E, U])
